creator: niallm-freebsd@enigma.ie
text:
With libiconv 1.6.1 building wv 0.6.2 works fine. However, after upgrading
	to 1.7 attempting to make wv 0.6.2 gives the following errors upon make:

su-2.03# make
===>  Building for wv-0.6.2
making oledecod in oledecod
gmake[1]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/textproc/wv/work/wv/oledecod'
gmake[1]: Nothing to be done for `all'.
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/textproc/wv/work/wv/oledecod'
making glib-wv in glib-wv
gmake[1]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/textproc/wv/work/wv/glib-wv'
gmake[1]: Nothing to be done for `all'.
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/textproc/wv/work/wv/glib-wv'
making libole2 in libole2
gmake[1]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/textproc/wv/work/wv/libole2'
gmake[1]: Nothing to be done for `all'.
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/textproc/wv/work/wv/libole2'
making expat in expat
gmake[1]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/textproc/wv/work/wv/expat'
making xmltok in xmltok
gmake[2]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/textproc/wv/work/wv/expat/xmltok'
gmake[2]: Nothing to be done for `all'.
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/textproc/wv/work/wv/expat/xmltok'
making xmlparse in xmlparse
gmake[2]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/textproc/wv/work/wv/expat/xmlparse'
gmake[2]: Nothing to be done for `all'.
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/textproc/wv/work/wv/expat/xmlparse'
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/textproc/wv/work/wv/expat'
making iconv in iconv
gmake[1]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/textproc/wv/work/wv/iconv'
cc -O -pipe   -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I/usr/local/include -I./ -I./../ -I./../libole2/ -I./../glib-wv/ -c ./iconv.c 
./iconv.c:10: syntax error before `wvConvertToUnicode'
./iconv.c:20: warning: excess elements in struct initializer
./iconv.c:20: warning: (near initialization for `inputs[0]')
./iconv.c:27: warning: excess elements in struct initializer
./iconv.c:27: warning: (near initialization for `inputs[1]')
./iconv.c:28: warning: excess elements in struct initializer
./iconv.c:28: warning: (near initialization for `inputs[2]')
./iconv.c:29: warning: excess elements in struct initializer
./iconv.c:29: warning: (near initialization for `inputs[3]')
./iconv.c:30: warning: excess elements in struct initializer
./iconv.c:30: warning: (near initialization for `inputs[4]')
./iconv.c:31: warning: excess elements in struct initializer
./iconv.c:31: warning: (near initialization for `inputs[5]')
./iconv.c:32: warning: excess elements in struct initializer
./iconv.c:32: warning: (near initialization for `inputs[6]')
./iconv.c:33: warning: excess elements in struct initializer
./iconv.c:33: warning: (near initialization for `inputs[7]')
./iconv.c:34: warning: excess elements in struct initializer
./iconv.c:34: warning: (near initialization for `inputs[8]')
./iconv.c:41: warning: excess elements in struct initializer
./iconv.c:41: warning: (near initialization for `outputs[0]')
./iconv.c:42: warning: excess elements in struct initializer
./iconv.c:42: warning: (near initialization for `outputs[1]')
./iconv.c:43: warning: excess elements in struct initializer
./iconv.c:43: warning: (near initialization for `outputs[2]')
./iconv.c:44: warning: excess elements in struct initializer
./iconv.c:44: warning: (near initialization for `outputs[3]')
./iconv.c: In function `iconv_open':
./iconv.c:56: structure has no member named `proc'
./iconv.c:65: structure has no member named `proc'
./iconv.c: In function `iconv':
./iconv.c:82: syntax error before `proc'
gmake[1]: *** [iconv.o] Error 1
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/textproc/wv/work/wv/iconv'
gmake: *** [ICONV] Error 1
*** Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/textproc/wv.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/textproc/wv.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/textproc/wv.

	There are later versions of wv available.

Fix: 

None known.
How-To-Repeat: 
	cd /usr/ports/converters/libiconv && make install && cd /usr/ports/textproc/wv && make install
